title: Add tests to make sure podman container and podman image commands work
body:
We have little to no testing to make sure we don't break podman image and
podman container commands that wrap traditional commands.

This PR adds tests for each of the commands.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Tests are all exploding, but code LGTM
They are exploding because they are testing what is currently broken in the CLI.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2480) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Lets see if we pass these tests now.

@baude @vrothberg @mheon @TomSweeneyRedHat @giuseppe PTAL

These tests pass, so it gives us confidence the CLI is fully working now.
